name: Paysafecard Prepaid Voucher Payment API
what_it_does: Paysafecard prepaid voucher payment REST API for e-commerce merchants, online gaming platforms, and digital content stores to accept anonymous prepaid voucher payments from customers using 16-digit PIN codes purchased at 650,000+ retail outlets in 50+ countries, enabling card-free, bank-account-free payment for privacy-conscious consumers and those without card or bank access. Enables AI agents to manage paysafecard payment initiation for prepaid voucher checkout automation, handle payment confirmation for PIN redemption automation, access payment status for voucher transaction verification automation, retrieve my paysafecard for digital wallet automation, manage refund credit for voucher payment reversal automation, handle multi-PIN payment for large purchase authorization automation, access webhook notification for payment event automation, retrieve merchant transaction for reconciliation automation, manage serialNumber tracking for voucher management automation, and integrate paysafecard with gaming, digital content, and e-commerce platforms for end-to-end anonymous prepaid payment automation.
use_cases: Accepting anonymous paysafecard PIN payments for online gaming top-up from checkout automation agents
Processing paysafecard voucher redemption for digital content purchase from gaming platform agents
Enabling prepaid payment for unbanked consumers in online marketplaces from inclusion agents
Receiving paysafecard payment webhooks for gaming or digital service activation automation agents
not_for: Large-value transactions (paysafecard has limits: typically €1,000 max per PIN)
Recurring billing (paysafecard is one-time voucher, not recurring payment method)
B2B payments (paysafecard is consumer prepaid, not B2B invoice or vendor payment)
best_when: An online gaming platform, digital content store, or e-commerce merchant wanting AI agents to accept anonymous prepaid paysafecard PIN payments from customers without requiring cards or bank accounts across 50+ countries.
avoid_when: PAYMENT IS NOT INSTANT — REQUIRES PIN FLOW: Paysafecard payment requires consumer to enter 16-digit PIN from retail purchase; automated card-style instant payment assumption creates wrong checkout UX; automated checkout must prompt PIN entry and validate against paysafecard network. REFUND GOES BACK TO MY PAYSAFECARD WALLET: Paysafecard refunds credit consumer's my paysafecard digital wallet, not original PIN; automated physical pin refund assumption creates wrong refund path; automated refund must confirm consumer has my paysafecard account. MULTI-PIN PAYMENTS HAVE LINKING RULES: Paysafecard allows combining up to 10 PINs; automated single-PIN-only checkout for purchases over PIN limit creates payment_insufficient; automated must implement multi-PIN flow for higher amounts. CONSUMER KYC LIMITS APPLY: Paysafecard anonymous use limits vary by country; automated high-limit anonymous assumption creates KYC_REQUIRED for large amounts in regulated markets.

auth.notes: Paysafecard uses API key for merchant authentication. REST API with JSON. Vienna, Austria HQ. Founded 2000 by Michael Müller and Armin Sageder. Paysafe Group subsidiary (NYSE: PSFE, acquired 2014). Products: Paysafecard PIN voucher, my paysafecard digital wallet, paysafecash (cash voucher). SDKs: None public. FCA-regulated. PSD2. 650,000+ retail outlets. 50+ countries. 20M+ paysafecard users. Particularly strong in Germany, Austria, Turkey, Greece for online gaming. Competes with Neosurf and NeoSurf for prepaid voucher payments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox testing via Paysafe developer account; production requires paysafecard merchant agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Transaction fee: 4-7% per paysafecard payment (negotiated by merchant category and volume)
pricing.notes: Vienna AT. Paysafe (NYSE:PSFE). FCA-regulated. Per-transaction % fee. Anonymous prepaid niche.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; webhooks for payment initiation and completion events

known_agent_gotchas: TWO-STEP PAYMENT FLOW (INITIATE + CONFIRM): Paysafecard payment uses initiate (get redirect URL) + consumer enters PIN on paysafecard page + retrieve/confirm on return; automated single-call payment assumption creates incomplete checkout; automated must implement redirect flow with PIN entry step

REFUND CREDITS MY PAYSAFECARD WALLET: Paysafecard refund credits consumer's my paysafecard digital wallet (not original PIN); automated physical voucher refund assumption creates wrong refund channel; automated refund requires consumer to have my paysafecard account

MULTI-PIN FLOW FOR LARGE AMOUNTS: Paysafecard individual PIN has €100-€150 face value; automated large purchase assumes single-PIN payment creates insufficient_funds; automated must support multi-PIN linking for purchases exceeding single PIN value

PAYMENT STATUS IS POLLING-BASED: Paysafecard payment completion requires polling paymentId for INITIATED → AUTHORIZED → SUCCESS status; automated webhook-only assumption misses polling requirement; automated must implement status polling loop

CONSUMER KYC LIMITS IN REGULATED MARKETS: Paysafecard anonymous use has country-specific limits; automated high-value anonymous assumption creates KYC_REQUIRED in EU AML-regulated scenarios; automated must handle KYC threshold gracefully
agent_readiness.security_notes: Prepaid voucher payment. FCA, PSD2, AML, GDPR. API key. EU/AT. Payment and voucher transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Prepaid voucher. FCA, PSD2, AML, GDPR. API key. EU. Voucher and transaction data.
